title: Tooltip
description: Contextual hint shown on hover or focus over an element. Supports multiple placements, semantic colors, configurable delays and rich content.

placements.title: Placements
placements.desc: Four main placements. Each variant also accepts -start and -end to align with a trigger edge.

rich.title: Rich content
rich.desc: Use the content slot to include markup, icons or keyboard shortcuts inside the panel.
rich.heading: Keyboard shortcut
rich.shortcut: Press Ctrl+K to open the search.

icon.title: Over icon-only button
icon.desc: Essential on icon-only buttons to describe the action to screen reader users.

delays.title: Delays
delays.desc: Adjust openDelay to avoid intrusive tooltips when moving the cursor between buttons.

props.content: Tooltip text. Use the content slot for markup.
props.offset: Distance in px between trigger and panel.
props.arrow: Shows an arrow pointing to the trigger.
props.wrapperClass: Extra classes for the trigger wrapper.

emits.updateOpen: Change in open/closed state of the tooltip.

slots.default: Trigger element over which the tooltip is shown.
slots.content: Custom panel content. Replaces the content prop.

types.title: Tooltip
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Tooltip component props. Includes TooltipPlacement and TooltipTrigger union types for positioning and interaction control.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the trigger; tooltip opens on focus
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbEsc: Close the tooltip when it is open
a11y.ariaTooltip: The panel uses role tooltip for screen reader identification
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Links the tooltip text to the trigger element for screen reader context
a11y.focusNative: The trigger element remains focusable; the tooltip is announced on focus
a11y.focusKeyboard: Escape closes the tooltip; focus movement keeps it open
